title: Server crashes with segfault during GROUP BY after lightweight UPDATE
description:
### Company or project name
Dbappsecurity Co.,Ltd.
DataSecurity developers Team.
### Describe what's wrong
A segmentation fault crashes the ClickHouse server when executing a SELECT xx GROUP BY query on a table that has undergone a lightweight UPDATE.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
[https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/a0efeecc-87de-486e-babf-1657a063d350](https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/a0efeecc-87de-486e-babf-1657a063d350)
```sql
CREATE TABLE testa (
x UInt32,
y UInt32
) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY x;
INSERT INTO testa  (x, y) SELECT (number + 1) AS x, (x % 1000) AS y FROM numbers(9999);
alter table testa MODIFY SETTING enable_block_offset_column = 1;
alter table testa MODIFY SETTING enable_block_number_column = 1;
alter table testa add column z UInt32 default 0 after y;
update testa set z = y where x > 0;
select z / 100 as a, count() as b from testa group by all order by b desc limit 10;
```
### Expected behavior
No crash, users can query the results normally.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testb (a INT, b DOUBLE PRECISION, c TEXT);
INSERT INTO testb (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 1.1, 'test1'), (2, 2.2, 'test2'), (3, 3.3, 'test3');
ALTER TABLE testb ADD COLUMN d TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
UPDATE testb SET d = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE a < 3;
SELECT AVG(b) AS avg_b, COUNT(*) AS total FROM testb GROUP BY d ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY query after lightweight UPDATE causes server crash
